rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARGUERITA L. RUBEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Daniel Rubels Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Points And Authorities In Support And Declaration Of Brian F Connors In Support
rulings.Rulings: The motion is off calendar. The motion is off calendar because the 4th and 5th causes of action contained in the Petition have not been challenged by any Respondent motion (demurrer or otherwise). The 4th and 5th c/a are still part of the underlying Petition to be adjudicated by this court. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on April 27, 2011
